visual: Steps diagonally into a bow stance with one hand guarding above the forehead palm-out and the other pushing forward at chest height, repeated to alternating corners.
motion_description: The motion begins with a weight shift to the left leg as the hands cross in front of the chest. The body pivots clockwise approximately 180 degrees, stepping the right foot behind the left and then out forward into a right bow stance as weight shifts onto the front leg. During this step, the right arm sweeps upward to guard above the forehead with the palm facing out, while the left hand pushes steadily forward at chest level. The movement maintains a slow, continuous flow throughout the sequence.
